final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 工笔重彩 horizontal scroll painting of the 元宵灯会 in 唐代长安城.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩长卷 aesthetic — exact brushwork fineness and pigment layering are yours
Composition: must be a panoramic horizontal scroll (长卷) format
Subject: must include the 元宵灯会 scene with 万盏花灯 illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include 唐代长安城 at night as the setting
Lighting/mood: needs a lantern-lit night atmosphere with warm, glowing light across the scene — exact light distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, luminous direction befitting 重彩 — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional Chinese painting surface treatment — exact silk or paper texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
